LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT JAMES CHENG'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. A DECLARATION MUST THEN BE FILED WHICH SPECIFIES WHETHER THE MEET AND CONFER WAS IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE. JUANA LORENA HERNANDEZ IS ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY APRIL 10, 2023. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Continued To Aug-23-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Juana Lorena Hernandez 415-665-9587 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Taghi Astanehe, Esq. 650-281-6342 for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court asks questions on the smalll claims case and the trial de novo matter. Plaintiff argues. Defense' counsel responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES CHENG DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Ricahd B. Ulmer Jr, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an order sustaining demurrer is signed and filed. (see scanned order for details)***

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JAMES CHENG DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT JAMES CHENG's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. Juana Lorena Hernandez is ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by April 10, 2023.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/CK)
